name: pool-route
description: PreToolUse(Bash) suggestion hook, implemented in hexa-lang (`_pool_route.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`) — when a command is host-specific (macOS-only: swift/xcodebuild/xcrun · GPU/CUDA: nvidia-smi/nvcc), inject an additionalContext suggesting the appropriate `pool on <host>` dispatch. Non-blocking. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_POOL_ROUTE=1.
